memories.title: API server
memories.description: The HTTP API is served from the api package.
memories.existingBody:
## Current

The API server starts from `packages/api/src/server.ts`.
staleReasons: Referenced file packages/api/src/server.ts no longer exists

memories.title: Result errors
memories.description: Domain operations return Result objects instead of throwing.
memories.body:
## Updated

Use the shared `Result` helper for recoverable domain failures.
memories.existingBody:
## Current

Use tuples for recoverable domain failures.
